known_issues: Actor availability error recurring - fixing one feature breaks another (regression cycle)

existing_features.title: Review and fix frontend actor initialization in useActor.ts to handle authentication state changes without breaking backend connectivity
Verify and stabilize the media asset deletion functionality to work reliably without causing actor availability issues

new_feature_requests.summary: Investigate and resolve the root cause of recurring 'actor not available' errors that create a regression cycle where fixing one feature breaks another
Ensure stable actor initialization and persistence throughout the application lifecycle to prevent intermittent availability failures
